title: Arch Linux Installation Guide on VirtualBox
description: Guide on instaling Arch Linux on a VirtualBox without Archinstall. Besides OS installation, i also went over some extra stuff to make the OS more suitable for a daily driver

title: Attack on the Vigenère Cipher Key Through Index of Coincidence Optimization Based on Dynamic Programming
description: Analysis on the algorithmic speedup of using Dynamic Programming in the Index of Coincidence calculation in the implementation of Vigenere Cipher's key solver. In the paper, i compared the efficiency and effectivity on various plaintext sizes

title: Analyzing Computational Complexity of Popular Cryptographic Algorithms to Determine the Most Efficient Cryptosystem
description: Analyzing three different Cryptographic Algorithms, RSA, ECC and AES to compare their efficiency on different sizes of plaintext using computational complexity evaluation and empirical data from implementations of such algorithms

title: Application of Linear Algebra for Optimizing Collision Detection in Precision Parry-Based Combat Systems for Sekiro-like Games
description: In this paper i explored optimizations of collision detection algorithms which utilizes Linear Algebra. Algorithms included in the paper are Axis-Aligned Bounding Box (AABB), and Separating Axis Theorem (SAT)
